hero.subtitle: No fixed costs. You only pay a small commission per completed shipment. We connect companies with verified professional carriers.

stepsCompanies.step1Desc: Create your account in less than 2 minutes. No sign-up fee or commitment.
stepsCompanies.step2Desc: Write what you need to ship. Our AI automatically calculates weight, volume, and optimal vehicle.
stepsCompanies.step3Desc: Our algorithm finds the ideal driver by proximity, availability, and vehicle type.
stepsCompanies.step4Title: Track your shipment in real time
stepsCompanies.step4Desc: Track your shipment with GPS from pickup to delivery. Notifications at every step.

stepsDrivers.step1Desc: Complete your profile with your details and experience. No sign-up fee.
stepsDrivers.step2Desc: Our team reviews your application to ensure service quality.
stepsDrivers.step3Desc: You receive shipments that match your area, vehicle, and availability.
stepsDrivers.step4Desc: Accept shipments, navigate to destination, and confirm deliveries from your phone.

benefitsCompanies.noFleetDesc: No need to invest in trucks or drivers. Access a network of verified carriers.
benefitsCompanies.pricingDesc: No fixed fees. You only pay a commission per completed shipment. Transparent and predictable.
benefitsCompanies.trackingDesc: Follow every shipment in real time. Know exactly where your goods are at all times.
benefitsCompanies.invoicingDesc: Invoices automatically generated when each shipment is completed. Download and manage from your portal.

benefitsDrivers.noSearchDesc: Shipments come to you. Don't waste time looking for cargo: we assign it to you.
benefitsDrivers.flexDesc: You decide when and where to work. Set your availability and action radius.
benefitsDrivers.payDesc: Guaranteed payments for every completed shipment. No unpaid invoices or chasing payments.
benefitsDrivers.appDesc: Accept shipments, navigate, confirm deliveries, and manage your schedule from a single app.

pricing.label: Pricing
pricing.title: No fees. No surprises.
pricing.subtitle: We only charge a small commission for each successfully completed shipment.
pricing.commissionDesc: We only charge a small percentage for each successfully completed shipment. If you don't ship, you don't pay. It's that simple.

cta.title: Ready to get started?
cta.subtitle: Whether you need to ship goods or transport them, CargoHub connects you with no fixed costs. You only pay for results.

footer.description: Leading platform for transport and logistics management. We connect companies with professional drivers for a fast, safe, and efficient service.

login.title: Log In
login.subtitle: Access your client portal
login.noAccount: Don't have an account? Sign up
login.passwordRecoveryUnavailable: Password recovery is currently unavailable on web. Please contact support.

register.title: Create Account
register.subtitle: Join CargoHub
register.accountTypeQuestion: What type of account do you want to create?
register.name: First name
register.driverInfoBox: After registration, an admin will review your profile before activating your account. We will notify you by email once approved.
register.hasAccount: Already have an account? Log in
register.successMessage: Your account will be reviewed by our team. We will notify you once approved.
register.errorPasswordLength: Password must be at least 6 characters.

dashboard.requestPorteDesc: Describe your cargo and we assign a driver
dashboard.viewMyPortesDesc: Check the status of your shipments
dashboard.noRecentActivity: No recent activity. Request your first shipment!

portes.noPortesDesc: Request your first shipment to get started
portes.pendingDriverAwaitingAcceptance: The cargo request has been created successfully. We will assign you a driver as soon as possible.
portes.manualReview: We could not analyze the cargo. The shipment will be manually reviewed by one of our agents.
portes.assignmentPending: The cargo request has been created successfully. We will assign you a driver as soon as possible.

facturas.noInvoicesFiltered: No invoices found with the selected filters.
facturas.noInvoicesYet: You have no invoices generated yet.

solicitar.title: New Shipment Request
solicitar.subtitle: Describe your cargo and our AI system will calculate the dimensions and required vehicle.
solicitar.cargoPlaceholder: E.g.: 10 pallets of electronic products, each 1.2m x 0.8m x 1.5m, approx 200kg each. Requires closed van.
solicitar.aiNote: Our AI will analyze the description to calculate dimensions, weight, and required vehicle type.
solicitar.pickupDateRequired: Pickup date and time are required.
solicitar.originSelectionRequired: Select a real origin from the suggestion list.
solicitar.destinationSelectionRequired: Select a real destination from the suggestion list.
solicitar.invalidLocationsError: Origin and destination must be selected from real suggestions.
solicitar.successMessage: The cargo request has been created successfully. We will assign you a driver as soon as possible.

accessUnavailable.title: Portal unavailable for this account
accessUnavailable.description: Your session is active, but this portal is enabled only for customer accounts with a complete profile.
accessUnavailable.reasonRole: If your account is a carrier (driver), please use the driver mobile app.
accessUnavailable.reasonMissingClient: If you are a customer and still don't have a clienteId assigned, your account may still be pending activation.
accessUnavailable.mobileAppHint: If you are a driver, use the mobile app.
